empty.noColors: No colors available for this trim.
empty.noWheels: No wheels available for this trim.
empty.noInteriors: No interiors available for this trim.
empty.noPackages: No packages available for this trim.

package.confirmMessage_one: {{packageName}} isn't compatible with {{names}}. Selecting it will remove that package from your build.
package.confirmMessage_other: {{packageName}} isn't compatible with {{names}}. Selecting it will remove those packages from your build.

summary.title: Your {{carName}} — Build Summary
summary.signature: Configured with Car Configurator OS — an open-source project.

disclaimer.short: Fictional vehicle · AI-generated imagery · Not affiliated with any manufacturer

home.tagline: An open-source automotive configurator built entirely client-side. Real-time pricing, shareable URLs, conflict detection — no server required.
home.badge: MIT License · No backend · No login

liveConfigurator.title: Live configurator
liveConfigurator.desc: Pick trim, color, wheels, interior, and packages. Pricing updates in real time with full line-item breakdown.

shareableBuilds.title: Shareable builds
shareableBuilds.desc: Every configuration is encoded into the URL. No login, no server, no database — share a link, anyone sees your exact build.

conflictAware.title: Conflict-aware packages
conflictAware.desc: Incompatible option combinations are automatically detected and surfaced — the same kind of logic production car configurators use.

typedDomain.title: Typed domain model
typedDomain.desc: Car, Trim, Color, Wheel, Interior, Package — fully modeled in TypeScript with pricing and validation as pure functions.

zeroCost.title: Zero-cost hosting
zeroCost.desc: Fully static — deploys in one command to GitHub Pages, Vercel, or Netlify. No backend required.

testedLogic.title: Tested core logic
testedLogic.desc: Pricing, rule validation, and URL codec covered by Vitest unit tests. CI-ready from day one.

home.screenshotsPlaceholder: Screenshots coming soon — run the configurator to see it live
home.footer: Car Configurator OS · MIT License · Open source
home.footerDisclaimer: Car Configurator OS is an independent demo project created for showcase purposes only. Falcon X and Aureon S are fictional, concept-style vehicles, and all vehicle imagery is AI-generated and illustrative. This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or approved by any automotive manufacturer, distributor, or brand owner, and no specifications shown are official manufacturer data.
